name: Law Offices of Trang Do
description_short: Law Offices of Trang Do is a credit repair provider based in San Jose, California. Rated 5.0/5 with 74 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Law Offices of Trang Do is a credit repair provider serving clients in San Jose, California. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 74 reviews, Law Offices of Trang Do has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the San Jose area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a bankruptcy attorney, bankruptcy service, law firm, Law Offices of Trang Do provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in San Jose, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Law Offices of Trang Do operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the San Jose, California area who are considering Law Offices of Trang Do should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
